evidence.purpose: Paths, sequence labels, and runtime facts.

body-small.purpose: Dense supporting copy on inverse surfaces.

shadows.name: product-lift
shadows.purpose: Separates authentic product frames from the working plane.

motion.name: ease-out-expo
motion.purpose: Compact control and canvas reveal transitions.

motion.name: reduced-motion
motion.purpose: Makes all non-essential transitions effectively immediate.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary route to the public source repository.
components.html: View source
components.css: .ds-button-primary { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:.6rem; min-height:2.75rem; padding:.75rem 1rem; border-radius:6px; background:var(--zinc-ink); color:var(--clear-surface); font:500 .75rem/1.4 var(--font-mono); text-decoration:none; transition:background-color 150ms ease,transform 180ms var(--ease-out-expo); } .ds-button-primary svg { width:1rem; height:1rem; fill:none; stroke:currentColor; stroke-width:1.35; } .ds-button-primary:hover { background:var(--night-hover); transform:translateY(-2px); } .ds-button-primary:focus-visible { outline:2px solid var(--maka-blue-strong); outline-offset:3px; }

components.name: Signal Button
components.description: A single emphasized action on the inverse source section.
components.css: .ds-button-signal { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; min-height:2.75rem; padding:.75rem 1rem; border-radius:6px; background:var(--maka-blue); color:var(--zinc-ink); font:500 .75rem/1.4 var(--font-mono); text-decoration:none; transition:background-color 150ms ease,transform 180ms var(--ease-out-expo); } .ds-button-signal:hover { background:var(--maka-blue-strong); color:var(--clear-surface); transform:translateY(-2px); } .ds-button-signal:focus-visible { outline:2px solid var(--maka-blue); outline-offset:3px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.css: .ds-button-ghost { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; min-height:2.75rem; padding:.75rem 1rem; border:1px solid var(--hairline); border-radius:6px; background:var(--working-plane); color:var(--zinc-ink); font:500 .75rem/1.4 var(--font-mono); text-decoration:none; transition:border-color 150ms ease,background-color 150ms ease; } .ds-button-ghost:hover { border-color:var(--maka-blue-strong); background:var(--signal-wash); } .ds-button-ghost:focus-visible { outline:2px solid var(--maka-blue-strong); outline-offset:3px; }

components.name: Primary Navigation
components.description: Opaque command-bar navigation with a compact Maka wordmark.
components.html: MAKAWorkRuntimeArchitecture
components.css: .ds-nav { display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between; min-height:4rem; padding:0 1rem; border-bottom:1px solid var(--hairline); background:var(--working-plane); color:var(--zinc-ink); font:500 .75rem/1.4 var(--font-mono); } .ds-nav a { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; min-height:2.75rem; padding:0 .9rem; color:inherit; text-decoration:none; } .ds-nav a:hover { background:var(--signal-wash); } .ds-nav a:focus-visible { outline:2px solid var(--maka-blue-strong); outline-offset:3px; } .ds-wordmark { gap:.6rem; font-weight:650; letter-spacing:.16em; } .ds-wordmark svg { width:1.75rem; fill:none; stroke:currentColor; stroke-width:1.4; } .ds-wordmark circle { fill:var(--maka-blue); stroke:none; }

components.name: Product Proof Frame
components.description: Authentic product evidence with compact workspace chrome.
components.css: .ds-product-frame { margin:0; overflow:hidden; border:1px solid var(--hairline); border-radius:8px; background:var(--clear-surface); box-shadow:0 6px 8px oklch(0.17 0.005 286 / .08); color:var(--secondary-ink); font:500 .625rem/1.4 var(--font-mono); } .ds-product-chrome { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:.35rem; min-height:2rem; padding:0 .75rem; border-bottom:1px solid var(--hairline); } .ds-product-chrome i { width:.35rem; height:.35rem; border:1px solid var(--secondary-ink); border-radius:50%; } .ds-product-chrome span { margin-left:auto; } .ds-product-canvas { display:grid; min-height:12rem; place-content:center; background:var(--cool-surface); color:var(--secondary-ink); } .ds-product-frame figcaption { padding:.5rem .75rem; border-top:1px solid var(--hairline); }

narrative.overview: The website translates Maka's official Companion Command Center into a public, evidence-led brand surface. It feels like a precise work instrument laid open in daylight: a cool white plane, stable measurements, compact controls, and one live blue signal that makes execution legible. The measured grid, edge telemetry, and DOM/WebGL cooperation come from the reference study, but the content model is Maka's own: task, turn, Tool Call, permission, artifact, Event Log, and recovery.
keyCharacteristics: One connected working plane instead of stacked marketing cards.
Restrained blue signals against cool achromatic structure.
Large exact typography paired with compact runtime evidence.
Real product screenshots integrated into the spatial narrative.
One purposeful execution-field motion system with a complete static fallback.

rules.name: The Signal, Not Texture Rule
rules.body: Blue communicates action or runtime state. It never becomes a background flood, gradient, glow, or decorative atmosphere.

rules.name: The Restrained Strategy Rule
rules.body: Blue stays below 10% of a viewport. If a screenshot makes the page feel blue, the surrounding canvas gets quieter rather than adding another color.

rules.name: The Native Evidence Rule
rules.body: Mono is reserved for code, paths, coordinates, commands, identifiers, and numeric evidence. Marketing sentences always use the sans voice.

rules.name: The One Statement Rule
rules.body: Only one text block per viewport earns display scale. Display tracking never goes tighter than -0.04em.

rules.name: The One Working Plane Rule
rules.body: Dividers express responsibility; shadows never fragment the page into a dashboard.

rules.name: The Honest Glass Rule
rules.body: Blur and transparency never substitute for hierarchy. Navigation remains opaque enough to preserve contrast.

dos: Do integrate real Maka screenshots beside the claim they prove.
Do use Maka Blue only for action, focus, selection, and live state.
Do keep semantic DOM content complete beneath the execution field.
Do gate renderer work by visibility, cap DPR at 2, and provide reduced-motion and WebGL fallbacks.
Do re-compose the grid for mobile with 44px touch targets and no horizontal reading scroll.
donts: Don't use generic AI tool marketing: purple-blue gradients, decorative glow, glassmorphism, sparkle, floating chat bubbles, or fake thinking.
Don't use fake terminal aesthetics, invented commands, fake metrics, fake dashboards, testimonials, or capability claims unsupported by the official repository.
Don't use mascots, anime characters, fake emotion, or avatar-led storytelling.
Don't use identical card grids, hero-metric templates, bento layouts, or repeated tiny uppercase section eyebrows.
Don't make a surface-level clone of haoqi.design, including its acid green, exact section order, typography ratios, portfolio content, custom fonts, or shader code.
Don't use gradient text, side-stripe accents, decorative grid wallpaper, cream/sand backgrounds, or card radii above 16px.
